Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Alicia Queen, Esq. 510-457-3440 of Stratman, Schwartz & Williams-Abrego for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Counsel reports there is a problem with service and she is dropping the motion. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JESSICA CHHUTH's Motion To Compel Answers To Special Interrogatories.

Off calendar. Moving party has dropped its motion.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
